paragraphs.text: Secure your seat for three days of industrial resilience and supply-chain dialogue in Pittsburgh, May 14–16, 2025. Early-bird pricing ends April 1.
By registering you agree to the Ironclad Futures Summit code of conduct and refund policy. Confirmation will be sent to your work email.

items.text:
General Admission
          Full access to all three days of sessions, keynotes, and networking receptions.
          $495

Workshop Add-on
          Add hands-on workshop access on Day 1. Must be combined with General Admission.
          + $150

Group of 5+
          Discounted pricing for teams of five or more registering from the same organization.
          $395 / person

Contact
      Ironclad Industry Alliance
      1000 Fort Duquesne Blvd
      Pittsburgh, PA 15222
      info@ironcladfutures.org
      (412) 555-0184

Quick Links
      Program
      Speakers
      Venue
      Register
      About

Social Handles

      YouTube / IroncladFuturesTV
      Press: media@ironcladfutures.org
